question: What is the budget for IT equipment and software per year?
answer_paragraph: The company has a budget of $10,000 per year for IT equipment and software. This budget will be used to purchase new equipment and software, as well as to maintain and update existing equipment and software. The budget will be managed by the IT department, and all purchases must be approved by the department head.

question: Who is the IT department head?
answer_paragraph: The company has a number of employees who are responsible for enforcing this policy. These employees include John Smith, the IT department head, and Jane Doe, the HR manager. They will be responsible for monitoring employee usage of IT equipment and reporting any violations to the IT department.

question: What is the replacement schedule for laptops?
answer_paragraph:
The company will maintain accurate and up-to-date records of all IT equipment and software. This will include records of purchases, maintenance, and upgrades. The records will be maintained by the IT department, and will be available for review by authorized personnel.

IT EquipmentReplacement Schedule
LaptopsEvery 3 years
DesktopsEvery 5 years
Mobile DevicesEvery 2 years

question: When is the training on IT security scheduled?
answer_paragraph:
